calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-30-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Marina Franco, Esq. for Plaintiff Parkmerced Investors Properties LLC, represented by agent Quinneth Sandelin.
Mary Moycik, Esq., through limited scope, for and with the Defendant(s) Joseph Nicolas and Geogina Rivera.
This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement "Settlement agreement and stipulation for entry of future judgment", which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of Jan. 4, 2010 is vacated.
